response.justification: Aisha has strong technical depth across multiple languages and domains, with clear experience in testing infrastructure, CI/CD, and developer tooling, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, team leadership, or organizational change initiatives required for this managerial role, and mobile platform experience is only implied through iOS app maintenance rather than systemic tooling.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI systems, code generators)
Proven track record in test automation, TDD, and CI/CD practices across multiple teams
Active open-source contributions and knowledge sharing through workshops and talks
concerns: No clear documentation of formal people management or team leadership experience
Mobile platform expertise limited to iOS app maintenance, not build/test infrastructure
Lacks evidence of strategic roadmap planning or cross-team alignment at scale
